hero.subtitle: Modern regenerative treatments, high-precision diagnostics, and first-class care. Everything under one roof – at an international premium level.

features.title: Why Regeneration Clinic?
features.subtitle: Four pillars on which your health and rapid recovery are built.

items.title: Cutting-Edge Medicine
items.desc: State-of-the-art and high-quality top medicine, coupled with high-tech diagnostics directly on site.

items.title: Personal Care
items.desc: Benefit from first-class, familiar care and completely individual advice.

items.title: First-Class Experience
items.desc: Our chief physicians have the expertise of over 7,900 successful surgical procedures.

items.title: Absolute Discretion
items.desc: We place the highest value on your privacy and offer an environment of pure relaxation.

team_preview.quote: For us, medical excellence means not only the latest technology, but above all the time and dedication for every single patient.
team_preview.name: Prof. Dr. J. Masin
team_preview.role: Chief Physician of Orthopedics & Spinal Surgery

items.title: Initial Contact & Consultation
items.text: Send us your MRI images conveniently from home. Our specialists evaluate them and discuss the best therapy strategy with you via telemedicine.

items.title: Arrival & High-Tech Diagnostics
items.text: We welcome you to Riga. Before treatments start, we use our 3.0 Tesla and 128-slice CT Diagnostics for a 100% precise picture of your individual situation.

items.title: Therapy & Healing
items.text: Execution of the most modern procedures (e.g., minimally invasive pain therapy). After the treatment, you rest in our luxurious rooms with 24/7 premium care.

video.title: Medical Knowledge Explained Simply
video.desc: Complex medical relationships prepared simply. In our explainer videos, we bring important medical topics closer to you.

items.text: Incredible medical competence! From the first diagnosis on the MRI to the aftercare, I felt perfectly looked after.
items.author: Michael T.

items.text: The long journey to Riga was 100% worth it. Luxurious ambiance and a standard far above what I know from home.
items.author: Sarah K.

items.text: You can tell that the focus here is strictly on the patient as a human being. Absolute discretion and medical care at a world-class level. Thank you!
items.author: Dr. Johannes B.

premium_care.desc: As a patient from the EU, you benefit from our care in accordance with EU Directive 2011/24/EU (corresponding cost absorption by statutory health insurance is possible).

features.title: Everything in one place
features.text: Complete diagnostics and therapy – inpatient or outpatient at the highest standard.

map.title: Your Way to Us
map.desc: Centrally located in the medical heart of Riga. easily accessible and perfectly equipped for international patients.

services_page.title: Our Medical Services
services_page.subtitle: High-precision diagnostics and minimally invasive therapy concepts at a global premium level.

items.name: 3.0 Tesla MRI
items.desc: Highest image resolution for soft tissue, joints, and the spine without radiation exposure.

items.name: Spectral-CT (from 2025)
items.desc: Ultra-fast 128-slice imaging of the most modern generation for the most precise surgical planning.

items.name: Stem Cell Therapy
items.desc: Autologous stem cells for the natural regeneration of cartilage and joint structures.

items.name: Minimally invasive pain therapy
items.desc: Targeted, image-guided interventions on the spine for immediate pain relief.

items.name: Spinal Disc Surgery
items.desc: Microsurgical interventions with state-of-the-art robotic assistance systems.

items.name: Joint Replacement
items.desc: Tailor-made joint replacement with minimal tissue trauma.
